arts.ttl: Barcelona Handed Major Injury Blow Ahead of Inter Showdown
arts.sum: Runaway La Liga leaders Barcelona will likely encounter Inter in their heavyweight Champions League semi-final tie without Robert Lewandowski. According to the club's statement on X, the Polish veteran has sustained a semitendinosus injury and will undergo careful examinations in the coming days. The post Barcelona Handed Major Injury Blow Ahead of Inter Showdown appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm Robert Lewandowski injury ahead of Real Madrid and Inter Milan fixtures
arts.sum: Barcelona may have won 4-3 against Celta Vigo on Saturday, but one of the big takeaways is Robert Lewandowski’s injury problem that has now been confirmed by the Catalan giants. In the 78th minute of proceedings at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys, Lewandowski pulled out whilst holding his hamstring.
